puzzles.title: One Word, Four Lives
puzzles.question: I'm a platform where you post videos. I'm also what a creator "goes" when broadcasting live. I'm also a flowing body of water. And I'm also what you do to music or shows without downloading them. What single word am I?
hints: Think about what Netflix, Spotify, and Twitch all have in common.
It's a word that existed long before the internet — you might find one in a forest.
A Twitch streamer literally does this word to fans watching this word of water.
puzzles.flavor_text: Some words just keep showing up everywhere — in the woods, on your phone, in your browser tab. This one has lived many lives.
puzzles.solution_explanation: The word STREAM satisfies all four clues: (1) a streaming platform (like Twitch, YouTube, Netflix), (2) going 'live' as in 'going live on stream,' (3) a natural stream of water, and (4) the act of streaming music or video content without downloading it. All four definitions point unambiguously to STREAM.
